commands.review_summary:
The PR removes skills browse-count copy, moves the List/Grid toggle into the Skills header row, preserves Clear for active filtered states, tightens responsive toggle sizing, and expands route regression tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR changes directly observable current-main UI copy and layout rather than addressing a runtime bug that needs a separate reproduction path.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining merge gate is human inspection of real-browser evidence for this member-authored visual change; no concrete code repair is identified for automation.

target.title: fix: remove skills browse count copy
target.body:
## Summary

- Remove the `/skills` count copy entirely, including the title count next to `Skills` and the previous loaded-result toolbar count.
- Move the List/Grid view toggle into the same header row as the `Skills` title, above the skills search input.
- Tighten the List/Grid segmented-control height so it stays compact in that header row.
- Keep the Clear control available for search/category/featured filtered states.
- Add coverage for empty, paginated browse, search pagination, category-filtered states, the view-toggle/search/header order, and a `0` count response in the page title.

## Verification

- `bun run test src/__tests__/skills-index.test.tsx --testNamePattern "total skills count"`
- `bun run test src/__tests__/skills-index.test.tsx src/__tests__/skills-index-load-more.test.tsx`
- `bun run format:check -- src/routes/skills/index.tsx src/__tests__/skills-index.test.tsx`
- `bunx tsc --noEmit`
- `bun run ci:static`
- `bun run ci:unit`
- Local browser check at `http://127.0.0.1:3000/skills`: title text is exactly `Skills`; no `.browse-count` exists in the skills title; List/Grid remains in the same header row; no `loaded` or `results` count copy; no horizontal overflow.

## UI Proof

- Local screenshots saved at `/tmp/clawhub-pr-2586/skills-no-title-count-mobile.png`, `/tmp/clawhub-pr-2586/skills-no-title-count-tablet.png`, `/tmp/clawhub-pr-2586/skills-no-title-count-desktop.png`, and `/tmp/clawhub-pr-2586/skills-no-title-count-screenshot-wide.png`.
target.author: jesse-merhi
